---
name: ❓ Question / methodology discussion
about: Not a bug, not a feature request — a question about how something works or why a choice was made
title: '[Q] '
labels: question
---

## The question

<!-- Ask away. Examples of good questions here:

 - "Why does the engine use LTM = FY0 − Prior YTD + Current YTD instead of just summing the 4 most recent quarters? I thought summing was simpler."
 - "The Cost of Capital page has 6 β variants; which is most appropriate for a REIT?"
 - "How do I map a ticker that isn't in Damodaran's classification file?"

Questions about Damodaran's methodology itself are better directed at his Stern page or his Musings on Markets blog — this repo focuses on the software *implementation* of his framework.
